name: Portuguese Green Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Idaho potatoes, peeled and thinly sliced
1 pound kale, washed, trimmed of the thick stems, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium soup pot, heat 3 tablespoons olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add onions and garlic to the pot. Cook for 2 to 3 minutes until they turn glassy, ensuring they do not brown.
3. Add potatoes and water. Cover and bring to a gentle boil over medium heat for 20 minutes.
4. In a skillet, cook the chorizo sausage until most of the fat has rendered out. Drain the excess fat before adding the sausage to the soup pot.
5. Once the potatoes are tender, mash them directly in the pot using a potato masher.
6. Add the cooked sausage and kale to the soup. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
7. Stir in the remaining olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
8. Ladle into bowls and serve.
Yield: 6- 8 servings
